isomorphism: Diagonal block factorization L11 is unchanged.
For each subdiagonal panel row, the column loop c=0..jb and inner t=0..c subtraction order are unchanged.
Rows below the panel are independent once L11 has been factored; the lever only changes row scheduling across disjoint mutable row chunks.
The lower-only Schur update order and its GEMM accumulation order are unchanged.
Output remains the same row-major lower-triangular L with unchanged dtype, shape, non-square rejection, non-positive-definite NaN surface, and no tie-breaking or RNG surface.
